sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.13 is a cosmetic UI release: the results-table 'ET' column is renamed 'ET candidate' (with a hover tooltip), 'Run Another Scan' becomes a secondary button shown above and below the results table, and a second 'Start Scan' button is added at the top of the URL list. No scan-behavior, credit, or rule-output change.
